title: dryopteris corazonensis
intro: Dryopteris corazonensis, also known as the Philippine golden fern, is a species of fern native to the Philippines. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Dryopteris corazonensis include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against certain diseases such as cancer and neurodegenerative disorders. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it may also be used in herbal infusions or decoctions.
